mapper.select:
SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.menu_check_strictly, r.dept_check_strictly, r.status, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = 0
AND r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND r.role_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleKey}, '%')
AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.role_sort ASC, r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.menu_check_strictly, r.dept_check_strictly, r.status, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_role r WHERE r.role_id = #{roleId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.menu_check_strictly, r.dept_check_strictly, r.status, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.role_sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.menu_check_strictly, r.dept_check_strictly, r.status, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.role_sort ASC
SELECT role_id, role_name FROM sys_role WHERE role_name = #{roleName} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT role_id, role_key FROM sys_role WHERE role_key = #{roleKey} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.menu_check_strictly, r.dept_check_strictly, r.status, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = 0
AND r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND r.role_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleKey}, '%')
AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.role_sort ASC, r.create_time DESC
